prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约1353名，2024年后移至约1421名，2025年略回升至约1403名；近三年整体波动幅度约68名，2025年基准位次约1403名；该校 在新疆文科招生计划2023年为2人，2024年增至3人，2025年维持3人；2026年计划仍为3人，与2025年持平，未扩招也未缩招，竞争压力未因计划变化而缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 安徽大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第101名，近年排名略有波动（2021年90→2026年101），整体处于中游211水平；2023年 高考周期内曾出现师德师风负面舆情（教师要求女生穿超短裙表演），评价为偏负面；但2024、2025、2026年均无新增显著舆情事件，抖音热度评级为一般（总排名第84），整体 关注度平稳，无明显报考热度异常信号。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该 校在新疆文科仅招政治学与行政学专业，对应政治学一级学科；新疆2025年文科考生约24010 人，2026年总考生约238000人，按近年文科占比约31.4%估算，2026年文科考生约74732人，较2025年大幅增加，竞争加剧2025年文科本科一批45 1分较2024年425分上升，反映整体竞争趋紧；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在1400名附近窄幅波动、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、新疆文科考生规模预计大幅增加、学校 排名略有下降等因素，2026年报考竞争预计略有加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约1433名，区间1363-1503名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 1353, shifting to about 1421 in 2024, and slightly recovering to around 1403 in 2025; the overall fluctuation range over the past three years is about 68 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 1403 in 2025; the university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Xinjiang was 2 in 2023, increased to 3 in 2024, and maintained at 3 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains 3, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, so competitive pressure has not eased due to plan changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 101st, with slight fluctuations in recent years (90th in 2021 to 101st in 2026), overall at a mid-tier 211 level; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was a negative public opinion incident regarding teacher ethics (a teacher required female students to wear miniskirts for a performance), rated as somewhat negative; but in 2024, 2025, and 2026, there were no new significant public opinion incidents, with Douyin heat rating as average (overall ranking 84th), overall attention stable, with no abnormal signals in application popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university only offers the Political Science and Administration major for liberal arts in Xinjiang, corresponding to the first-level discipline of Political Science; the number of liberal arts examinees in Xinjiang in 2025 is approximately 24,010, and the total examinees in 2026 is about 238,000, with liberal arts accounting for about 31.4% in recent years, estimated liberal arts examinees in 2026 at about 74,732, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition; the 2025 liberal arts first batch undergraduate score of 451 points rose from 425 points in 2024, reflecting tighter overall competition; Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical rankings fluctuating narrowly around 1400, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the expected significant increase in the number of liberal arts examinees in Xinjiang, and the slight decline in university ranking, the competition for 2026 applications is expected to intensify slightly, with rankings shifting slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1433, with a range of 1363-1503.

Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 1363-1503 can actively apply; those with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<1363) have a high chance of admission, while those near the lower limit (>1503) should be cautious.
